retry_reason: The put operation either succeeds (possibly freeing the object) or is a no-op for the init namespace; there is no transient failure that would make retrying productive. If refcount_dec_and_test returns false, the caller must not reuse the object anyway.
contract_summary: Release wrapper for namespace reference counting. Decrements the reference count on a non-init ns object; returns true if the count reached zero (caller should then destroy/free the object), false otherwise. For the init namespace, it is a no-op that merely warns and returns false; the caller must not attempt to free init namespaces via this path. After calling this function, the caller must no longer access the ns object (unless they hold another valid reference).
